name: ragmap
description: RAG-focused subregistry + MCP server to discover and route to retrieval-capable MCP servers using semantic search, filters, and explainable ranking.

tools.name: rag_find_servers
tools.description: Search/filter RAG-related MCP servers from the RAGMap subregistry.

tools.name: rag_get_server
tools.description: Get latest server record by registry name.

tools.name: rag_list_categories
tools.description: List RAG categories used for filtering.

tools.name: rag_explain_score
tools.description: Explain RAG relevance score for a server.

npm.description: Run RAGMap MCP locally via stdio (connects to hosted API)

http.description: Use hosted Streamable HTTP endpoint (no install)

examples.title: Find RAG servers
examples.description: Search for retrieval-capable MCP servers by meaning or filters
examples.prompt: Find MCP servers that support RAG with remote (streamable HTTP) transport
